channel.title: esolangs on Tardigrado
channel.description: Recent content in esolangs on Tardigrado

item.title: Build you a brainfuck compiler for the greater good
item.description: How I built an optimizing brainfuck to C compiler using Haskell, and you could too.

item.title: Mixtape
item.description: MixTape, a new esoteric programming language with a Grid and a Tape. It’s the love child of Brainfuck and Befunge.
